sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ نُورَةُ أَمَامَ طَاوِلَتِهَا وَأَخَذَتِ القَلَمَ.
sentences.translation: Nura je sjela za sto i uzela olovku.
sentences.translationEn: Noura sat at her desk and picked up the pen.

sentences.translation: Napisala je svoje ime na listu za ispit.
sentences.translationEn: She wrote her name on the exam paper.

sentences.translation: Pažljivo je pročitala pitanja prije odgovaranja.
sentences.translationEn: She carefully read the questions before answering.

sentences.translation: Završila je ispit prije isteka vremena.
sentences.translationEn: She finished the exam before the time was up.
